faction.name: Light Dragons
faction.lore: Worshipped and feared as the alleged creators of the Warlands, the Light Dragons guard both the earth and the sky. Their luminous flames are powerful enough to know and dispel all darkness.

spell.name: Dragon Blood
spell.effect: Place 2 Reserve Dice as 2 Dragon Warriors horizontally or vertically adjacent to the Light Dragon, then put the Light Dragon back to the Reserve.

passives.name: Luminous Flame
passives.effect: Gain 1 virtual victory point for each creature of Power Level 6 that you have more than your opponent in the Warlands.

creatures.name: Fire Basilisk
creatures.movement: Serpent Trail: Move or attack always diagonally.
creatures.attack: Serpent Trail: Move or attack always diagonally.

passives.name: Inner Fire
passives.effect: Whenever the Fire Basilisk defeats a Creature, it can perform one additional Movement or Attack.

spell.name: Blood Trade
spell.effect: Put up to X Reserve Dice into Exile to get X+1 Trigger Points. X is the number of your Blood Mages in the Warlands. Then use any number to upgrade friendly Creatures. Unused Trigger Points lapse at end of turn. Spell cannot be used on the Blood Mage casting it.

spell.name: Brotherhood
spell.effect: Split a Dragon Warrior into 3 Souls. Place 2 Reserve Dice as Souls horizontally or vertically adjacent to the Dragon Warrior. Then downgrade the Dragon Warrior to a Soul.

creatures.name: Ghost
creatures.movement: Ghost Trail: Move up to 2 spaces in the same direction. You can move through Creatures too.
creatures.attack: Ghost Trail: Attack up to 2 spaces in the same direction. You can move through Creatures too.

passives.name: Lifepulling
passives.effect: If a Ghost moves through another Creature, whether your own or your opponent's, this Creature loses 1 Power Level. Additionally, receive 1 Trigger Point. Opposing creatures of Power Level 1 are sent into the Exile; your own creatures return to the Reserve.

passives.name: Cursed
passives.effect: If a Ghost is defeated by an opposing Creature, this Creature's Power Level is downgraded by 2.

creatures.name: Soul
creatures.movement: Floating: Move as much as you want over adjacent friendly Souls.

passives.name: Protective Barrier
passives.effect: If there are 3 to 6 Souls adjacent to each other, a Protective Barrier is formed. Protective Barriers are immune to Attacks, Spells and Specialties of your opponent's Creatures. If there are more than 6 Souls adjacent to each other, return remaining Souls to the Reserve at the end of your turn.
